content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Applied all 4 pending amendments: (1) gated --verbose behind retry (attempt_number > 1) so first-attempt successful invocations are unchanged, (2) truncated runtime log error messages to 500 bytes via truncate_to_char_boundary to prevent unbounded log lines, (3) added bounded stderr_tail to the 'invalid Claude result JSON' error path so verbose CLI diagnostics reach the runtime log for the motivating failure scenario, (4) introduced STDERR_DETAIL_LIMIT (512 bytes) and truncated stderr in both non-zero exit error detail construction paths to prevent large verbose/prompt-echo payloads from bloating run.ndjson — full output remains in runtime/failed/<id>.failed.raw.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Gate --verbose behind attempt_number > 1 in build_command() (process_backend.rs ~line 790) so first-attempt successful invocations have unchanged behavior; added explanatory comment
2. [Completed] Add import of truncate_to_char_boundary to engine.rs and truncate error_message to 500 bytes before writing to runtime log
3. [Completed] Add bounded stderr_tail (200 bytes) to the 'invalid Claude result JSON' error path in process_backend.rs finish() — the motivating failure scenario from the bead description
4. [Completed] Add STDERR_DETAIL_LIMIT constant (512 bytes) and apply truncate_str_tail to both non-zero exit error detail construction paths (fresh retry path and primary path) to prevent unbounded stderr in InvocationFailed messages
5. [Completed] Replace build_command_claude_includes_verbose_flag test with two tests: build_command_claude_omits_verbose_on_first_attempt and build_command_claude_includes_verbose_on_retry
6. [Completed] Update finish_claude_invalid_result_json test to verify stderr_tail is included (renamed to finish_claude_invalid_result_json_includes_stdout_len_and_stderr, uses ChildOutput with stderr)
7. [Completed] Run cargo fmt, cargo test (757 pass, 0 fail), cargo clippy (0 new warnings in modified files), cargo fmt --check (clean)

## Validation Evidence

- 5 new/updated tests pass: finish_claude_invalid_envelope_includes_stdout_len_and_stderr, finish_claude_invalid_result_json_includes_stdout_len_and_stderr, build_command_claude_omits_verbose_on_first_attempt, build_command_claude_includes_verbose_on_retry, finish_codex_invalid_last_message_includes_output_sizes
- 590 lib tests pass (0 regressions, up from 585 in prior round)
- 757 total tests pass across all test targets (0 failures)
- cargo fmt --check passes with no formatting issues
- cargo clippy shows 0 new warnings in modified files (engine.rs, process_backend.rs)

## Outstanding Risks

- Claude CLI --verbose on retries writes additional stderr output; the 512-byte STDERR_DETAIL_LIMIT truncation means very long verbose output will be clipped in the error message, but the full content is always in runtime/failed/<id>.failed.raw
- Codex CLI has no equivalent --verbose flag; transient Codex CLI failures still rely on captured stderr and runtime/failed/*.failed.raw artifacts for diagnosis
- The 500-byte truncation on runtime log error messages (via truncate_to_char_boundary) may clip useful context for complex errors, but the full error is always available in journal.ndjson
